case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. AMKO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC AND IT'S SUCCESSORS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT AMKO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC AND IT'S SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
FEE PAID FOR APPLICATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100008247) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMKO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC AND IT'S SUCCESSORS $1,660.00 PRINCIPAL, $171.46 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,056.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
